creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254832
Screenshot: #helpdesk-chat channel content present after clicking away from the channel

If it helps: today, I realised that the bug (if it is still the same bug) is not pervasive. 

Re: the attached screenshot, I found it possible to guess the position of the FreeBSD icon in the column at far left. After clicking there, FreeBSD server-related content became partly usable in the second and third columns. 

After clicking away from the #helpdesk-chat channel to helpdesk-forum, there remained #helpdesk-chat content in the third column. This might be a separate bug.
